common.tagline: Shaping the Future of Early Education

footer.aboutText: HiKids is a modern kindergarten franchise bringing structured, progressive early education to communities worldwide.

hero.subtitle: Empowering children through innovation and educational excellence.

whatIs.title: What is Hi Kids ?
whatIs.subtitle: A modern educational franchise built on progressive learning levels, designed to nurture every child's potential from their earliest years.
whatIs.description: HiKids combines structured curriculum with creative, play-based learning. Our method guides children through progressive developmental levels, ensuring each milestone is celebrated and built upon.

levels.name: Explorers
levels.description: Sensory discovery, basic social skills, and language foundations through guided play.

levels.name: Discoverers
levels.description: Creative expression, early numeracy, and collaborative learning adventures.

levels.name: Innovators
levels.description: Critical thinking, problem-solving, and pre-literacy skills for school readiness.

levels.name: Leaders
levels.description: Independence, advanced communication, and social-emotional leadership development.

hero.title: Where Curiosity Becomes Capability
hero.subtitle: Dedicated to providing the highest quality early education through innovation, care, and community.

about.metaTitle: About HiKids | Progressive Early Childhood Education

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: A Legacy of Learning & Love
story.description: HiKids was born from a vision to revolutionize early childhood education. What started as a single innovative center has grown into a global family of kindergartens, united by a belief that every child deserves a brilliant start. Our journey is one of continuous discovery, driven by the smiles of our children and the trust of our parents.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To make world-class early education accessible to every child by empowering local entrepreneurs and educators with a proven, structured, and joyful learning system.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where every child has access to nurturing, progressive early education that celebrates their unique potential and prepares them for lifelong learning.

method.title: The HiKids Method
method.subtitle: Our proprietary educational approach combines the best of modern pedagogy.

pillars.title: Play-Based Learning
pillars.description: Children learn best through guided play experiences that stimulate curiosity and creativity.

pillars.title: Progressive Milestones
pillars.description: Clear developmental goals for each age group, with regular assessments and celebrations.

pillars.title: Emotional Intelligence
pillars.description: Social-emotional skills are woven into every activity, building empathy and self-awareness.

pillars.title: Parent Partnership
pillars.description: Regular communication and involvement keeps families connected to their child's learning journey.

philosophy.title: Educational Philosophy
philosophy.description: We believe every child is born with incredible potential. Our role is to create safe, stimulating environments where that potential can flourish. The HiKids philosophy centers on respect for the child, structured exploration, and the joy of discovery.
principles: Every child learns at their own pace
Play is the language of childhood
Safety and trust are the foundation

levels.title: Progressive Levels System
levels.subtitle: Our four-stage developmental journey ensures every child is supported and challenged appropriately.

founder.title: Build the Future
founder.name: Amy Szymanska
founder.description: Together HiKids is more than just schools. We are a community dedicated to raising the next generation.
founder.quote: Our goal isn't just to teach kids facts, but to nurture a life-long love for learning and discovery.

moka.title: Meet Moka
moka.subtitle: your Learning Companion
moka.description: Moka is the heart and soul of the HiKids family. As our friendly mascot, Moka accompanies children through every level, making learning an adventure filled with curiosity and kindness.

traits.title: Inquisitive
traits.description: Always exploring new ideas and asking 'why'.

traits.title: Empathetic
traits.description: Showing kindness and understanding to every friend.

traits.title: Courageous
traits.description: Facing new challenges with a smile and a positive heart.

whyJoin.title: Why Join HiKids?
whyJoin.subtitle: A franchise opportunity built for impact and growth.

features.title: Growing Market
features.description: The global early education market is expanding rapidly. Parents increasingly seek structured, quality kindergarten programs for their children.

features.title: Competitive Advantage
features.description: Our progressive learning levels, branded materials, and app integration set HiKids apart from traditional kindergartens.

features.title: Structured System
features.description: From curriculum to marketing, everything is systematized. You don't need education experience to succeed with HiKids.

features.title: Brand Recognition
features.description: Benefit from a professionally built brand with consistent messaging, visual identity, and market positioning.

method.title: Teaching Method
method.subtitle: Master the HiKids framework: How to implement the structure in your classroom.
method.overview: The HiKids method integrates structured framework with child-led exploration. Facilitators guide children through activities that build skills across four levels.
method.ctaSubtitle: Join the elite circle of global educators implementing the HiKids framework.

sections.title: How to Implement
sections.description: Practical steps for daily adoption. Transitioning from theory to classroom practice with HiKids materials.

content.subtitle: Step 01. Initial Setup
content.text: Arrange dynamic learning stations tailored to the HiKids developmental zones.

content.subtitle: Step 02. Daily Integration
content.text: Seamlessly blend our specialized Activity Sheets into your daily lesson sequences.

content.subtitle: Step 03. Progress Tracking
content.text: Utilize observation-based metrics to document key developmental milestones.

sections.title: Framework Explanation
sections.description: A detailed look at our thematic units and how they expand across ages. This is the core of our educational engine.

content.subtitle: Explorers (Ages 2-3)
content.text: Prioritizes gross motor skills and foundational sensory discovery.

content.subtitle: Discoverers (Ages 3-4)
content.text: Encourages creative expression, early numeracy, and cooperative peer play.

content.subtitle: Innovators (Ages 4-5)
content.text: Builds vital critical thinking, pre-literacy, and advanced social-emotional competencies.

sections.title: Classroom Structure
sections.description: The physical and temporal organization of a HiKids environment. The balance between structure and freedom.

content.subtitle: Circle Time
content.text: Group bonding, daily concept introduction, and collaborative storytelling sessions.

content.subtitle: Free Play
content.text: Unstructured exploration in safe, thematic learning stations crafted for self-discovery.

content.subtitle: Focus Sessions
content.text: Guided, educator-led micro-lessons targeting specific cognitive capabilities.

benefits: Comprehensive training in the HiKids method

learningLevels.title: Learning Levels
learningLevels.subtitle: Understand the four progressive stages your child will experience.
learningLevels.excellenceDesc: Each level is a doorway to the next, ensuring your child transitions with confidence, curiosity, and the skills to conquer the world.
learningLevels.possibilitiesDesc: Our curriculum is a live roadmap, constantly evolving with the latest international standards to give every child their best unique start.
learningLevels.successDesc: The journey of a thousand steps begins with a single level.

levels.name: Explorers
levels.description: Your child begins their learning journey through sensory play, basic social interactions, and language foundations. Every day is an adventure of discovery.

levels.name: Discoverers
levels.description: Children expand their world through creative arts, early numeracy, and collaborative play. They learn to express themselves and work with others.

levels.name: Innovators
levels.description: Problem-solving, pre-literacy, and scientific thinking take center stage. Children learn to ask questions, test ideas, and think independently.

levels.name: Leaders
levels.description: The final stage prepares children for primary school with advanced communication, leadership skills, and a love for learning.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose HiKids
whyChoose.subtitle: Discover what makes HiKids the right choice for your family.

sections.title: Proven Educational Method
sections.description: Our progressive learning levels are backed by modern pedagogy and designed by early education experts. Every activity has a developmental purpose.

sections.title: Safety First
sections.description: All HiKids locations maintain the highest safety standards, including certified staff, secure facilities, and comprehensive health protocols.

sections.title: Emotional Development
sections.description: We prioritize social-emotional learning because we know that happy, confident children are better learners. Empathy, self-regulation, and resilience are core to our approach.

sections.title: Parent Partnership
sections.description: Stay connected through our app, regular progress reports, and parent-teacher conferences. You're always part of your child's learning journey.

sections.title: Qualified Educators
sections.description: Every HiKids teacher is trained and certified in our method, ensuring consistent quality across all locations.

sections.title: International Standards
sections.description: Whether in London, Warsaw, or Milan, your child receives the same high-quality HiKids experience.

app.title: HiKids App
app.subtitle: Stay connected to your child's progress with our mobile app.
app.description: The HiKids app gives parents real-time updates on daily activities, progress reports, photo sharing, and direct messaging with teachers. It's the easiest way to stay involved in your child's education.
features: Digital portfolio of your child's work
app.secureSubtitle: Your data is encrypted and secure. Stay connected with peace of mind.
app.downloadSubtitle: Available on iOS and Android. Empowering your child's success with world-class connectivity.
